projectDescription: A webhook-driven Signal bot powered by signal-cli-rest-api and OpenRouter, supporting mention-triggered group chat replies, slash-command search, image generation, and weather lookups across Signal, WhatsApp, and Telegram transports.
keyFeatures: Multi-transport support: Signal, WhatsApp (bridge), and Telegram
Mention-triggered group chat replies via OpenRouter LLM
Auto-search routing from normal chat messages (context mode)
Optional image generation via /imagine using OpenRouter
Per-conversation in-memory context history with configurable TTL
Number, group, and user allowlists for access control
Webhook deduplication to prevent repeated delivery handling
Customizable system prompts for bot personality
